sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32427" key="e)/kmaktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκμακτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἐκμάσσω</etym>) <sense id="n32427.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">express,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εἴδη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:22:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.7</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
